title: DevAutopilot Test Policy
description: Test policy definition linking UDS test-governance standards. Can be used by UDS CLI and other external tools.

pyramid_ratio.description: Recommended pyramid ratio (should sum to 100, empirical not mandatory)

command.description: Command to execute for automated verification (omit for Judge review)

required.description: Whether this check is mandatory (failure stops pipeline)

completion_criteria.description: Test completion criteria (ISO 29119 Test Completion Criteria / Agile DoD)
